courseData.title: Relational Database Mastery
courseData.description: A practical, ground-up guide to designing and building scalable backend databases.
courseData.notes: Ensure you have a basic understanding of web servers before starting.

materials.title: Basic CRUD Operations Summary
materials.content: All database interactions boil down to Create (INSERT), Read (SELECT), Update (UPDATE), and Delete (DELETE).

materials.title: Cascading Deletions
materials.content: Using ON DELETE CASCADE ensures dependent records (like materials in a section) are wiped out if the parent record is deleted.

questions.question_text: What does the acronym CRUD stand for?
Which SQL keyword is used to extract data from a table?
What happens if ON DELETE CASCADE is applied and a parent row is deleted?
questions.option_c: The corresponding child rows are also deleted.
questions.option_d: The child rows are set to NULL.
